name: Negotiator
description: A Dahl pistol with a two-round burst while aiming, backed by a fast fire rate, low recoil, and a generous magazine. Compared with most Dahl pistols, it stays steadier while delivering better sustained damage, and with enough fire-rate boosts the burst can become so quick that it almost looks instantaneous.
notes: It only appears at green rarity or higher and drops randomly from suitable world-drop sources.
